name: bootstrap eval: --bootstrap-token-budget caps total tokens spent on bootstrap eval (LLM-grading scenarios stop when exceeded)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --bootstrap-token-budget 100 --tokens-per-scenario 50 --report 2>out.txt && grep -E "budget exhausted" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
